modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't make calls to a certain number, getting busy error.

full_description_text: So, like, the user was trying to call this one number, right? But then they heard this message saying all circuits are busy. It was super weird because they checked the number and everything. They just kept getting that same error, like, "Your call cannot be completed as dialed." It was really frustrating!
short_description: Can't make calls to a certain number, getting busy error.
